title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
# Pride Salary Account Account is a great way to get more for your money
Our Pride Salary Account is our tribute to the defence personnel of the country, which has been specially designed keeping your requirements in mind. With this account you can expect banking anywhere, anytime. You can avail of special privileges, easier and quicker transactions and value-added services loaded with a host of exclusive offers to enjoy a renewed experience of convenient and hassle-free banking. As an esteemed Pride Salary Account holder you will be entitled to loads of benefits. Some of the benefits that you are entitled to as an employee: 


  * We provides concession in Demand drafts and pay orders
  * We have specialized representatives for our preferred customers to execute your banking needs more easily


Some of the benefits that you are entitled to as an employee. 


Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI bank offers a special salary accounts for the defense personnel of our country. Pride salary account provides the best saving benefits of your money.
